trivia_bullets.text: Mardu Banner represents the Mardu Horde, whose defining value in Khans of Tarkir is speed. The clan venerates the dragon's wings as their symbol; their mechanic is Raid (bonus if you attacked this turn). Khan Zurgo Helmsmasher leads the Mardu across the steppe and badlands.

"Speed to strike, fury to smash." No speaker attributed. The motto's percussive violence contrasts sharply with the Jeskai clan's contemplative equivalent; both follow the five-banner cycle's two-clause epigram template.

Illustrated by Daniel Ljunggren. The art shows the banner as a post-battle marker planted in debris rather than a pre-battle rallying standard, consistent with the Mardu identity of fast strike and swift departure. Carries the mardu clan watermark on the frame.

Mardu Banner has an EDHREC rank of 9,750 — the highest inclusion rate among the four banners in this wave. This likely reflects the large pool of popular Mardu commanders (Alesha, Who Smiles at Death; Edgar Markov; Zurgo Helmsmasher) generating demand for R/W/B mana fixing.

related_cards.name: Mardu Charm
related_cards.note: Mardu-aligned instant; thematic parallel in the clan cycle
